The '''''Derriphan''-class battleship''' was the primary [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used by the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. Most [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] of the time carried these vessels in their [[Navy/Legends|fleets]].<ref name="TOTJ:TGAOTS" />

==Characteristics==
By modern galactic standards they were fairly small, slow, and ungainly, but the Sith battleships were among the most powerful and fearsome warships of their time, despite sporting no [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />
One vessel was said to succumb only to the firepower of six main [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] warships, thanks to its heavy armor, and even then was able to cripple or destroy at least one of the opposing ships.

==History==
[[File:Sithbattleship.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Ludo Kressh]] attacks [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] citadel with battleships.]]

[[Ludo Kressh]] attacked his rival, [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], with a small fleet of these battleships, while Sadow would later on launch his [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|invasion]] of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] space using ''Derriphan''-class battleships of his own as primary space combatants.<ref name="TOTJ:TFOTSE">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire]]''</ref>

About one hundred battleships were created prior to the Great Hyperspace War, with only one remaining by the end of it. Naga Sadow sacrificed the remainder of his fleet to cover his escape when the Republic counterattacked.<ref name="TOTJ:TFOTSE" /> He hid his flagship on the [[Yavin 4/Legends|fourth moon]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]], where it would remain for 1000 years until discovered and used by the Sith Lord [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]]</ref>

Following Kun's defeat, the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] under Lords [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] and [[Darth Malak]] discovered the design's blueprints and produced more of them, using the massive [[Star Forge]]. They were effective against the Republic's [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], but suffered massive casualties due to having no shields.<ref name="KOTORCG" />
